title: Tetra Loopback
description: An addon mod made for Tetra that adds some modular curios and materials.
body:
**This mod adds several modular curios to Tetra: "emblem" and "goggles". It also adds a new curios slot.**

Some metal, gem, and socket materials have been added. 
Some special itemeffect were added and special GUI bars were created for them. 
A scroll associated with curios has been added to apply the corresponding improvements. 
A work block called ancient forge has been added for crafting materials.

If you have any questions or suggestions, you are welcome to come to my [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/6jXEgEPjx5) channel to discuss.

  

Currently, only version **_1.20.1_** is supported

Mod dependencies：

- Tetra6.5.0+

- Curios API 5.8.1+



Currently, an emblem consists of **peltate, gempeltate, pattern, and gemcore**. Dynamic slots are used to bind peltate to pattern and gempeltate to gemcore.

Goggles consist of **buckle, edge, frame, leftlense, rightlense, singlelense, and strap**. They also use dynamic slots to bind lenses to the frames they use.

If you are the author of datapack or modpack, you are free to use it as long as you follow the license (LGPLv3). You can configure some itemeffects through datapack.



Discord: https://discord.com/invite/6jXEgEPjx5

GitHub:https://github.com/Neferge466/Tetra-Loopback

It is already compatible with some of the native itemeffects of tetra.
